mapper.insert: insert into admin(username, password, real_name, id_card, icon, role, status, create_by, update_by) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{idCard}, #{icon}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
update admin
username = #{username},
icon = #{icon},
role = #{role},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, username, real_name as realName, id_card as idCard, icon, role, role_name as roleName, status, create_time as createTime from admin
and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and real_name like concat('%', #{realName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
